title: The Fight Nears Its End
description: On pages 16–18, the fight nears its end focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.
scene: On pages 16–18, the fight nears its end focuses on Zoro, Hatchan, Usopp, Nami as zoro’s injuries worsen during the fight, but he continues battling Hatchan while the others struggle around him.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How could I lose... to only 3 swords...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Sorry but I couldn't care less about you.

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: I have to hurry up and save luffy...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: RORDOA ZORO! HOW DARE YOU CUT DOWN HA...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You sure did punch me back pretty far.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There's actually a human in East Blue that can live after taking one of my punches?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm sure there're more than just me.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It seems I'm being under- estimated.

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
